understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal tile(s) (+) by moving a selectable piece (P) onto them within the step budget, possibly using multiple selectable pieces (P/S) to reposition blocks and access blocked areas.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each MOVE shifts the currently selected piece by one cell (3 pixels) in the chosen direction using pixel coordinates [x,y] where x increases right and y increases down. CLICK selects a different selectable piece at the given on-screen pixel position. If a pushable block is directly adjacent in the move direction, the move can push it along; if a wall or blocking boundary/object is in the way, movement may fail (and the blocked hints were only heuristics, not guarantees). Different wall-like boundaries can behave differently, so the only reliable way to learn is to attempt moves and observe whether the piece (and any adjacent pushable) actually shifts.

history.summary: Turn 1: MOVE_RIGHT | Try moving right despite the adjacent wall hint to test whether this wall blocks movement or allows sliding/teleport behavior.
history.reasoning: Try moving right despite the adjacent wall hint to test whether this wall blocks movement or allows sliding/teleport behavior.

history.summary: Turn 2: CLICK | All moves are blocked by walls for this selectable; switch control to the other selectable to test if it has an escape path toward the goal.
history.reasoning: All moves are blocked by walls for this selectable; switch control to the other selectable to test if it has an escape path toward the goal.

history.summary: Turn 3: MOVE_RIGHT | All four directions show adjacent wall; test if any wall is non-blocking by attempting to move right.
history.reasoning: All four directions show adjacent wall; test if any wall is non-blocking by attempting to move right.

history.summary: Turn 5: CLICK | Current selectable at [21,21] is boxed in by walls on all four sides, so switch back to the other selectable to explore another route.

history.reasoning: This selectable is boxed in by walls on all four sides; switch control back to the other selectable to continue exploring a path toward the goal.

history.summary: Turn 8: MOVE_RIGHT | All directions show adjacent walls; probe a move anyway to see if any wall is passable or has a special interaction.
history.reasoning: All directions show adjacent walls; probe a move anyway to see if any wall is passable or has a special interaction.
